description.content: Tenant boundary for Viam — owns locations, machines, members, billing, and registry items.
List organizations the caller has access to.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve a single organization by id.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Create a new organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Update an organization's name or public namespace.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Delete an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Logical grouping of machines (e.g., a building, site, or robot fleet).
List locations under an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve a single location by id.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Create a new location under an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Update a location's name or parent location.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Delete a location and all machines under it.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
A robot or smart machine running viam-server. Composed of one or more parts.
List machines (robots) in a location.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve a machine by id.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Create a new machine under a location.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Update a machine's name or location.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Delete a machine.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
A single viam-server process running on a device. A machine can have multiple parts.
List parts (viam-server processes) that make up a machine.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve a single machine part.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Create a new machine part.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Schedule a restart for a machine part.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve logs from a machine part.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Reusable machine configuration snippets, versioned and shareable across orgs.
List configuration fragments in an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Create a new configuration fragment.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve a fragment by id.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Update an existing fragment.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Delete a fragment.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Organization membership, invites, and authorizations (RBAC).
List members and pending invites for an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Invite a user to an organization with one or more authorizations.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Remove a member from an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
OAuth applications registered against a Viam organization for third-party integrations.
Register a new OAuth application against an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
List OAuth applications registered under an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Location and machine-part secrets used by SDKs to authenticate.
Create a new location-level secret used by SDKs to connect.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Revoke a location secret.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
List API keys with access to a machine.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

REST/JSON transcoding of the Viam AppService gRPC API. Manage organizations, locations,
machines (robots), machine parts, fragments, OAuth apps, and team memberships in the
viam.app cloud.

Canonical contract: https://github.com/viamrobotics/api/blob/main/proto/viam/app/v1/app.proto


Contact Support:
 Name: Viam Support
